actions.value:
XMR is experiencing issues due to the MyMonero implementation within Edge. The hard fork on 08/13/22 has become a challenge to implement. Your funds are not at risk however the wallet will not properly sync. 

If you need access to your funds immediately you can export your private key by tapping and holding on your XMR wallet and the tap "Master Private Key." NOTE: Do not store this key digitally as anyone with this key can access your funds. 

You can then use the key to import your wallet into a functioning wallet, some examples can be found here: https://monero.com/wallets. 

The MyMonero implementation within Edge is actively being worked on however we do not have an exact timeline to resolved this issue.  All funds are safe however sending, receiving, and viewing funds may not function properly. We do advise not sending until this is resolved. 
More information: https://twitter.com/edgewallet/status/1558915520203632640?s=21

If you would like more info on how to extract your XMR private seed please let us know.
